name: cc-enslaver
description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.15 adds English prompts/en/{session-start,user-prompt}.md mirroring the Chinese canonical, plus a CC_ENSLAVER_LANG=en environment switch in inject_context.py — closing the long-standing gap where rules/en/ shipped English rule text but injection was Chinese-only.
